title: Electric bicycle with a motor deactivation function
abstract: An electric cycle (1), such as an electric bicycle, an electric tricycle, an elec- trie carrier cycle, an electric messenger cycle, an electric tandem cycle or an electric scooter, comprising an electric motor (3) and a communication unit (4), the communication unit (4) being connected to the electric motor (3) such as to allow transferring signals from the communication unit (4) to the motor (3), the communication unit (4) being configured to receive a deactivation request, and the communication unit (4) being configured to, in reaction to the deactivation request, deactivate the electric motor (3) by any one of causing the electric motor to self-destruct and short circuiting the electric motor.
claims:
Claims P A T E N T C L A I M S 1. An electric cycle, such as an electric bicycle, an electric tricycle, an electric carrier cycle, an electric messenger cycle, an electric tandem cycle or an electric scooter, comprising: an electric motor, and a communication unit, wherein the communication unit is connected to the electric motor such as to allow transferring signals from the communication unit to the motor, wherein the communication unit is configured to receive a deactivation re- quest, and wherein the communication unit is configured to, in reaction to the deactiva tion request, deactivate the electric motor by any one of causing the electric motor to self-destruct and short circuiting the electric motor. 2. An electric cycle according to claim 1, wherein the communication unit is configured to, in reaction to the deactivation request, deactivate the electric motor by any one or more of sending a deactivation signal to the electric motor, and mechanically deactivating the electric motor. 3. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims, where in the deactivation request comprises a deactivation code, a deactivation sig nal or a deactivation message. 4. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims 1 to 3, wherein the communication unit further is configured to receive a reactivation request, and wherein the communication unit further is configured to, in reac tion to the reactivation request, reactivate the electric motor, preferably wherein the communication unit is configured to, in reaction to the reactivation request, reactivate the electric motor by sending a reactivation signal to the electric motor or by mechanically reactivating the electric motor, and/or pref- 

erably wherein the reactivation request is a reactivation code, the reactivation code comprising a part identifying the sender as the rightful owner of the electric cycle. 5. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims, where in the communication unit receives the deactivation request from an external unit, and/or wherein the communication unit receives the reactivation request from an external unit. 6. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims, and further comprising a first battery configured to power the electric motor and a second battery configured to power the communication unit. 7. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims, where in the electric motor is configured to be able to start only upon receipt of a start signal from the communication unit, preferably wherein the electric motor is configured to require said start signal: at each start, or repeatedly with a predefined time interval, or repeatedly for each of a predefined number of hours, days or weeks. 8. An electric cycle according to any one of the above claims, and further comprising an electric system, the electric system comprising: the electric motor, the communication unit, a controller, and at least one battery, and wherein the electric motor, the communication unit, the controller and the at least one battery are linked to one another in such a manner that if one of the electric motor, the communication unit, the controller and the at least one bat tery is deactivated, one or more of the others of the electric motor, the com- 

munication unit, the controller and the at least one battery are also deactivat ed. 9. An electric cycle according to claim 8, wherein the electric motor, the communication unit, the controller and the at least one battery are linked by comprising one or more of a common ID, a common deactivation unit or a common circuit component.
